title: Front Desk / Admin Officer (Hospital) Job at R & R Recruiting Services
content:
R & R Recruiting Services is a Recruitment Agency into Training, Consulting & Human Resources Management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / Admin Officer (Hospital)

Job Location: Ayobo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Attend to patients and visitors professionally.
	Manage calls, appointments, and front desk activities.
	Maintain records and handle administrative duties.
	Ensure smooth communication within the hospital.
	Provide excellent customer service at all times.


Qualifications


	Minimum of B.Sc. or HND qualification.


Requirement:


	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Must be organized and presentable.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For enquiries, Call 07079804607.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Restaurant Cashier",
  "description": "J-Six Group has eight locations in Lagos State and subsidiaries in the FMCG distribution, agribusiness, agricultural, and quick service restaurant (QSR) industries. We are positioned to offer reasonable discounts on purchases, high-quality products, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Cashier

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties


	Take customer orders at the counter.
	Receive payments and present change to customers.
	Pack food items neatly.
	Appeal to impatient or irritated customers, especially during rush hours.
	Manage the register, including all credit card and cash operations.
	Ensure a balance of the register at the end of the shift or working period.


Requirements


	Candidates must have an SSCE and OND qualification.
	A minimum of 1 year of prior experience in a fast food restaurant is an added advantage.
	Excellent mathematical and multitasking abilities.
	Basic knowledge of computers and other machines required for transactions.
	Outstanding customer relations skills and the ability to ensure a customer-priority culture
	Ability to work with flexibility on a shift basis.
	Only candidates living in proximity to the location will be considered.


Benefits


	Salary: N75,000 monthly.
	Staff Lunch
	Consumables.
	HMO.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@jsixgroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and preferred location as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "J-Six Group"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Restaurant Cashier Job at J-Six Group




        
    

        
        J-Six Group has eight locations in Lagos State and subsidiaries in the FMCG distribution, agribusiness, agricultural, and quick service restaurant (QSR) industries. We are positioned to offer reasonable discounts on purchases, high-quality products, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Cashier

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Take customer orders at the counter.
	Receive payments and present change to customers.
	Pack food items neatly.
	Appeal to impatient or irritated customers, especially during rush hours.
	Manage the register, including all credit card and cash operations.
	Ensure a balance of the register at the end of the shift or working period.


Requirements


	Candidates must have an SSCE and OND qualification.
	A minimum of 1 year of prior experience in a fast food restaurant is an added advantage.
	Excellent mathematical and multitasking abilities.
	Basic knowledge of computers and other machines required for transactions.
	Outstanding customer relations skills and the ability to ensure a customer-priority culture
	Ability to work with flexibility on a shift basis.
	Only candidates living in proximity to the location will be considered.


Benefits


	Salary: N75,000 monthly.
	Staff Lunch
	Consumables.
	HMO.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and preferred location as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Medical Sales Representative",
  "description": "Merit Healthcare Limited is a pharmaceutical company with a clear focus and vision. We currently have over a thousand distributors nationwide and sales representative located in the six geopolitical zones in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative&nbsp;

Job Locations:&nbsp;Badagry&nbsp; and Ikorodu - Lagos, Sango / Abeokuta - Ogun, Port Harcourt - Rivers, Abia, Awka - Anambra, Enugu, Calabar - Cross Rivers, Lafia - Nasarawa, Benue, Bauchi, Yobe, Ekiti, Asaba - Delta, and Benin - Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilties


	Promote and sell pharmaceutical products to healthcare professionals, hospitals, and pharmacies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with doctors, pharmacists, and other stakeholders.
	Achieve sales targets within the assigned territory.
	Conduct product presentations, detailing, and follow-ups.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback.
	Ensure proper product knowledge dissemination and compliance with company policies.
	Prepare and submit periodic sales and activity reports.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc./HND in a science-related field (e.g., Microbiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Pharmacy, or related discipline)
	1 - 3 years of experience in pharmaceutical/medical sales is an added advantage.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet sales targets.
	Good knowledge of the assigned territory.
	Must be willing to travel within assigned locations.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to:&nbsp;info@merithealthcare.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position and location as the subject of the mail.",

  },

Medical Sales Representative  Job at Merit Healthcare Limited




        
    

        
        Merit Healthcare Limited is a pharmaceutical company with a clear focus and vision. We currently have over a thousand distributors nationwide and sales representative located in the six geopolitical zones in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative 

Job Locations: Badagry  and Ikorodu - Lagos, Sango / Abeokuta - Ogun, Port Harcourt - Rivers, Abia, Awka - Anambra, Enugu, Calabar - Cross Rivers, Lafia - Nasarawa, Benue, Bauchi, Yobe, Ekiti, Asaba - Delta, and Benin - Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilties
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Promote and sell pharmaceutical products to healthcare professionals, hospitals, and pharmacies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with doctors, pharmacists, and other stakeholders.
	Achieve sales targets within the assigned territory.
	Conduct product presentations, detailing, and follow-ups.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback.
	Ensure proper product knowledge dissemination and compliance with company policies.
	Prepare and submit periodic sales and activity reports.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc./HND in a science-related field (e.g., Microbiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Pharmacy, or related discipline)
	1 - 3 years of experience in pharmaceutical/medical sales is an added advantage.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet sales targets.
	Good knowledge of the assigned territory.
	Must be willing to travel within assigned locations.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to: [email protected] using the Job Position and location as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Social Media / Digital Marketing Manager Job at Deen Consult




        
    

        
        Deen Consult is a dynamic professional services firm specializing in Recruitment, Training, and General Business Consultation. Established with a passion for helping organizations achieve sustainable growth, we serve as a trusted partner to businesses across diverse industries. Our mission is to bridge the gap between talent, knowledge, and performance, ensuring that our clients remain competitive in today’s fast-changing business environment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media / Digital Marketing Manager
Job Location: Lagos

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Spectra Industries is seeking a results-driven Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager to drive product awareness, generate distributor leads, and increase sales through digital channels.
	This role is not just content posting,it is focused on revenue generation, market visibility, and brand growth across Nigeria.


Key Responsibilities
Sales-Driven Digital Strategy:


	Develop and execute digital campaigns to promote products
	Drive B2B leads (distributors, wholesalers) and B2C demand


Social Media Management:


	Manage and grow:
	
		Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn
	
	
	Post daily content:
	Engage actively with customers, distributors, and inquiries


Content Creation:


	Create high-quality video highlighting Product quality andHygiene standards


Digital Advertising:


	Run paid ads
	Optimize campaigns for:
	
		Lead generation
		Sales conversion
	
	
	Manage advertising budgets efficiently


Lead Generation & Conversion:


	Generate and track:
	
		Distributor inquiries
		Bulk purchase leads
	
	
	Channel leads to:
	
		Sales team
		WhatsApp business
	
	
	Support product launches and promotions


Website & Online Presence
Analytics & Reporting:


	Provide weekly performance reports:
	
		Leads generated
		Sales conversions
		Ad performance
	
	
	Recommend improvements based on data


Required Skills & Experience


	3–5 years in digital marketing (FMCG preferred)
	Strong experience with:
	
		Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram)

	Content creation (graphics + video)
	Basic photography/video editing skills
	Strong understanding of Nigerian consumer market
	Ability to drive measurable business results.

  "title": "Network Support Officer",
  "description": "Dotmac Technologies Limited - We are an Information &amp; Communications Technology Solutions Company formed in 2008, located in Abuja, Nigeria. We deliver reliable, high performance IT Solutions and services to corporate, business and residential clients. We offer solutions that improve your operation, optimizing and delivering efficiency.

We offer a wide range of Services that are designed to improve and optimize the services of our clients. These include Network services, IT Security Solutions and cloud services. In meeting our clients&#39; needs, Dotmac designs solutions and integrates the requisite systems to achieve a pre agreed objective.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Network Support&nbsp;Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job type: Contract

Requirements


	OND and HND students needing industrial training or internship placement
	SIWES applicants in Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields
	Anyone with genuine interest in fiber, wireless, or network engineering
	Candidates who can commit to the full program schedule
	NYSC corp members looking for PPA placement in a technical role.


Selection criteria


	Genuine interest in telecom, networking, or ISP operations
	Willingness to learn and follow instructions in a structured environment
	Strong attitude, discipline, and consistency
	Availability for the internship period in Abuja or Lagos
	Basic computer literacy and willingness to work in the field

Network Support Officer Job at Dotmac Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Dotmac Technologies Limited - We are an Information & Communications Technology Solutions Company formed in 2008, located in Abuja, Nigeria. We deliver reliable, high performance IT Solutions and services to corporate, business and residential clients. We offer solutions that improve your operation, optimizing and delivering efficiency.

We offer a wide range of Services that are designed to improve and optimize the services of our clients. These include Network services, IT Security Solutions and cloud services. In meeting our clients' needs, Dotmac designs solutions and integrates the requisite systems to achieve a pre agreed objective.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Network Support Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Contract

Requirements


	OND and HND students needing industrial training or internship placement
	SIWES applicants in Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields
	Anyone with genuine interest in fiber, wireless, or network engineering
	Candidates who can commit to the full program schedule
	NYSC corp members looking for PPA placement in a technical role.


Selection criteria


	Genuine interest in telecom, networking, or ISP operations
	Willingness to learn and follow instructions in a structured environment
	Strong attitude, discipline, and consistency
	Availability for the internship period in Abuja or Lagos
	Basic computer literacy and willingness to work in the field
    

    

        Click here to Apply
